storyboard.title: The launch-video question
storyboard.purpose: State the problem in a bright, high-contrast opening and establish the film’s single question.

storyboard.title: Create the launch channel
storyboard.purpose: Move into the dark Slack world and show the named channel being created with a visible, causal input state.

storyboard.title: The workspace is ready
storyboard.purpose: Reveal the main workspace with the launch channel selected; carry the channel label from setup into the product surface.

storyboard.title: A product ready, no launch plan
storyboard.purpose: Let the unresolved launch need appear as a readable message: “The product is ready but... how do we launch it”.

storyboard.title: The answer in the thread
storyboard.purpose: Introduce the response “How about using Sequences?” and give it a settled read before the camera follows it.

storyboard.title: Type the turning point
storyboard.purpose: Push into the active message/composer surface and show the named product action `/sequences` being typed and submitted.

storyboard.title: Sequences launch dialog
storyboard.purpose: Make the command’s consequence the hero: the Sequences modal opens over the dimmed workspace and holds at display scale, with the real Create control visible.

storyboard.title: Create releases the frame
storyboard.purpose: Use the modal’s Create action as a brief confirmation and transition out of the dense workspace into an empty dark closing field.

storyboard.title: The launch-video transformation
storyboard.purpose: Resolve on the committed closing statement “Sequences transforms your product into a launch video” and hold without additional competing motion.
